title: Ticket Contract
description: Schema for worker ticket contracts in .ai/tickets/

role.description: Worker role assigned to this ticket

ticket_type.description: Type of work this ticket represents

objective.description: Clear description of what this ticket must accomplish

allowed_files.description: Glob patterns for files this ticket may modify

forbidden_files.description: Glob patterns for files this ticket must NOT modify

max_files_changed.description: Maximum number of files this ticket may change (diff budget)

depends_on.description: Ticket IDs that must complete before this one

acceptance_commands.description: Shell commands that must pass for this ticket to be accepted

approved.description: Whether this ticket has been explicitly approved

core_truth_refs.description: IDs of core truths this ticket must respect

plan_mode_code_override.description: Allow code file patterns even in plan mode
